intent.aboutCandidate: Public health professional on F1 OPT with biostatistics and data analytics strengths; mid-level; open to research and coordinator roles in healthcare and public health organisations.
intent.remarks: Do not push Associate Director level roles.

decisions.title: Growth Analyst
decisions.reason: Skip — different discipline; Growth Analyst role does not align with biostatistics or public health.

decisions.title: Founding Strategy & Operations
decisions.reason: Skip — different discipline; Founding Strategy & Operations role is not aligned with biostatistics or public health.

decisions.title: Health Data Scientist
decisions.reason: Strong fit — Health Data Scientist role aligns with candidate's biostatistics background, mid-level, and H1B sponsorship available.

decisions.title: Biostatistician II
decisions.reason: Skip — seniority mismatch; Biostatistician II role is at a senior level, which exceeds the candidate's mid-level preference.

decisions.title: Statistician Lead (underfill Senior/Intermediate)
decisions.reason: Skip — seniority mismatch; Statistician Lead role is at a senior level, which exceeds the candidate's mid-level preference.

decisions.title: Analyst/Associate: Data, Operations Insights
decisions.reason: Skip — excluded H1B; Analyst/Associate role does not sponsor H1B.

decisions.title: Business Analyst
decisions.reason: Skip — different discipline; Business Analyst role does not align with biostatistics or public health.

decisions.title: Analyst / Senior Strategic Analyst
decisions.reason: Skip — excluded H1B; Analyst / Senior Strategic Analyst role does not sponsor H1B.

decisions.title: Growth Strategist
decisions.reason: Skip — different discipline; Growth Strategist role does not align with biostatistics or public health.

decisions.title: Business Analyst
decisions.reason: Strong fit — Business Analyst role is remote, mid-level, and aligns with candidate's analytical skills, plus H1B sponsorship available.

decisions.title: Data Governance Consultant
decisions.reason: Skip — different discipline; Data Governance Consultant role does not align with biostatistics or public health.

decisions.title: Senior Business Analyst
decisions.reason: Skip — seniority mismatch; Senior Business Analyst role is at a senior level, which exceeds the candidate's mid-level preference.

decisions.title: Business Analyst (ERP Accounting)
decisions.reason: Skip — different discipline; Business Analyst (ERP Accounting) role does not align with biostatistics or public health.

decisions.title: Clinical Data Management Specialist
decisions.reason: Skip — different discipline; Clinical Data Management Specialist role does not align with biostatistics or public health.

decisions.title: Technical Business Analyst
decisions.reason: Skip — different discipline; Technical Business Analyst role does not align with biostatistics or public health.
